laws.title: Consistency in Visual Elements
laws.description: Ensure buttons, icons, and other visual elements maintain uniformity across different pages.
laws.remediation: Establish a design system with guidelines for all UI components to ensure consistency.

laws.title: Responsive Design
laws.description: UI elements should adapt seamlessly to various screen sizes to ensure a smooth viewing experience.
laws.remediation: Implement CSS media queries and flexible grids to enhance mobile responsiveness.

laws.title: Color Contrast
laws.description: Sufficient contrast between text and background colors to ensure readability against various backdrops.
laws.remediation: Apply WCAG AA standards for color contrast ratios.

laws.title: Use of White Space
laws.description: Appropriate use of white space for comfortable navigation and improved focus on key content areas.
laws.remediation: Design layout spacing guidelines and apply padding and margins uniformly.

laws.title: Typography Hierarchy
laws.description: Proper typography hierarchy to guide the user's eye and improve understanding of text content.
laws.remediation: Define font sizes, weights, and styles for H1, H2, and paragraph texts within the design system.
